appDesc.message: Kubwezeretsa YouTube kapangidwe ake tingachipeze powerenga (pamaso ngodya zonse ozungulira & zobisika sakonda) + redirects YouTube waufupi + midadada thumbnail malonda

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Onetsani manambala osakonda pogwiritsa ntchito Bwererani YouTube Sakonda deta

helptip_disableShorts.message: Redirect Shorts kuti tingachipeze powerenga lonse wosewera mpira

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Kubisa zazifupi kuti zisawonekere patsamba loyamba + zotsatira

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Kubisa Playables kuonekera pa tsamba lofikira

helptip_adBlock.message: Kubisa malonda thumbnails ku masanjidwe a tsamba lakunyumba

helptip_aiBlock.message: Bisani zinthu za AI kunyumba + masamba a kanema
